description: Wraps Codex CLI as MCP tools: query, review, search, assess, structured, sessions.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.hampsterx/codex-mcp-bridge

environmentVariables.description: Path to the codex CLI binary. Defaults to 'codex' on PATH.
environmentVariables.name: CODEX_CLI_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Model to use when the primary model hits a quota error.
environmentVariables.name: CODEX_FALLBACK_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Controls which MCP servers from ~/.codex/config.toml stay enabled inside the Codex subprocess. Empty/unset disables all non-required servers; 'inherit' passes config through; comma-separated names (e.g. 'serena,github') enables those; values starting with '{' or '[' are raw TOML.
environmentVariables.name: CODEX_MCP_SERVERS
